title: [TaCZ] Tactical Breaching
description: TaCZ Tactical Breaching adds realistic breaching, glass damage, grenades, gun smoke, and much more to tacz!
body:
![tacz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/817f85605e72a159f995ac25fb3fb2bd4f2de365_0.webp)

🔥 TaCZ Tactical Breaching

**TaCZ Tactical Breaching** is a tactical combat addon for **Timeless and Classics Zero (TaCZ)** that makes gunfights feel more realistic and cinematic.

Shoot through doors, trapdoors, and glass with TaCZ weapons, use frag grenades and flashbangs, and experience shell casings, bullet holes, smoke, sparks, debris, suppression sounds, dynamic lighting, blood effects, and tactical impact feedback.

Full mod description can be viewed: [here](https://github.com/SmartStreamLabs/TaCZ-Tactical-Breaching-Forge/wiki/Home-Page)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

🚪 Door & trapdoor breaching  
- 🪟 Glass damage with HP, shards, and passthrough  
- 💣 Frag grenade with shrapnel, smoke, dust, and custom sounds  
- ⚡ Flashbang with flash, tinnitus, and line-of-sight checks  
- 🔦 Tactical flashlight / laser interaction  
- 🕳️ Bullet holes, decals, scorch marks, and impact effects  
- 💨 Muzzle smoke, indoor smoke, and hot barrel effects  
- 🔊 Ricochets, suppression, flybys, and dynamic impact sounds  
- 🟡 Shell casings with physics  
- 🩸 Blood mist and wall/floor splatter  
- 🛡️ Armor hit sparks and deflection effects  
- 🌐 Multiplayer safe and server-side block damage  
- ⚙️ Fully configurable

**New features in 1.0.2:**

Added:
- Magazine drop system
- Realistic weapon jamming system
- New configuration options
- Ballistic armor plates: Soft, Ceramic, Heavy, and Military Grade
- Persistent shell casings that stay on the ground
- Command to delete shell casings
- Handcuffs and Handcuff Key
- Gas Mask and filter system
- Realistic distant gunshot audio system

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![bullets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e5dcecf645f704db1eec4fc9d443b67452c84a.png)

![door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3162336a4cce714887362591c6746a7dbc9928d.png)

![blood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/065d864699fd3ee5dc6a0cfdf5578b85d1420c83.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**📌 Requirements**

Minecraft **NeoForge 1.21.1**
- [UNOFFICIAL] TaCZ 1.21.1 NeoForge Port

- Tacz 1.20.1 Forge

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚠️ This is an unofficial TaCZ addon. Do not report addon bugs to the original TaCZ developers.**

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
